themes.label: Peace/Rest
themes.summary: This chapter offers peace, rest, stillness, comfort, or settled safety in God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "It shall be a sabbath of rest unto you, and ye shall afflict your souls, by a statute for eve...". Word-study detail reinforces "שַׁבָּת֥וֹן: of rest - a sabbatism or special holiday".
